title: alysicarpus glumaceus subsp. hispidicarpus
intro: Alysicarpus glumaceus subsp. hispidicarpus, also known as Indian horsefly, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its hairy fruit and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Alysicarpus glumaceus subsp. hispidicarpus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusion, decoction, and powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
